name: Celestial Beast
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Base DMG of the wielder's Strike and Exalt is increased by [StateArg1]%. After the wielder uses Strike, they gain a 5% Temporary Crit. Rate, stacking up to 3 times per turn. Upon reaching 3 stacks, they gain 15% Temporary Crit. DMG.
lore:
Time flowed, and Lotan could no longer clearly recall her memories of the planet's birth.
She only remembered that she was a chosen being.

This was a story that took place before all concepts had arisen.
"Life" had not yet taken root, and the "Gods" were still far beyond the heavens.
Within this chaotic nebula, Chaos collided with Chaos, and matter gradually took form amidst the impacts and turbulence.
Stars gathered dust, rocks rose into mountainous shapes, and atmospheres condensed into vast bodies of water.
Then, this place was declared a "planet."

The soul of Chaos, trapped within the cage of time, crashed against the newborn soil.
Unable to control its savage nature, driven by the urge to destroy, It toppled countless mountains and filled countless rivers and lakes.
Then—The "Gods" crossed the distant stars and descended upon the barren world.

The "Gods" brought the seeds of civilization, and also imprisoned the soul of Chaos within a "structured" body.
"Make a pact with me..."
Facing the roaring Spirit of Chaos, the white-robed "God" whispered.
"A great civilization will be born here."
"You will meet wise but inactive philosophers, and clash with uncertain blades... In the future, you will no longer be ruled by destruction and devastation."
"Until that day comes... Until we are reunited, protect this place for me."
